articles.title: Price Analysis: Ethereum Hits 6-Month High on BlackRock ETF Speculation
articles.description: Ethereum prices topped $2,050 Thursday, reaching the highest level since May. The rally comes amid rumors that BlackRock may soon file for an Ether ETF.The chart shows Ethereum remains in a clear uptrend, with the 50-day SMA and 20-day EMA providing dynamic support.However, the RSI is overbought at 80, signaling the rally may be overextended short-term. This could lead to a pullback or consolidation as the indicator cools off.Upside resistance may emerge around the current highs and psycholog...
